name: Lich
description: And so the dead will bury the dead. Ethreain, the Lich Hypnotizes an enemy unit, causing it to move towards a point between the Lich and the enemy unit while draining a percentage of its current mana.

abilities.name: Sacrifice
abilities.description: Sacrifices an allied unit and converts its current health to mana restore Lich. The higher Lich's level, the greater the health to mana restore and experience value. Cast Range: 700. Current Health as Damage: 100%. Current Health to Mana Restore Factor: 0.42. XP Factor: 0.69. Initial Cooldown: 120. Mana Restore Factor Increase: 0.03. Mana Cost: 120.

abilities.name: Frost Blast
abilities.description: Blasts the target enemy unit with damaging frost, dealing area damage and slowing movement and attack speed for a duration. The primary target receives both base and area damage. Cast Range: 575/600/625/650. Effect Radius: 200 (325). Base Damage: 40/80/120/160. Area Damage: 80/120/160/200 (205/245/285/325). Move Speed Slow: 25%. Attack Speed Slow: 30/40/50/60. Cooldown: 110/120/130/140.

abilities.name: Frost Shield
abilities.description: Applies a shield around the unit-targeted ally. Deals damage per second and slowing the enemy's movement speed centered around the buff-affected allied unit. Applies all effects of Frost Shield around the Ice Spire and regenerating its health while the ice magic pulsates. Cast Range: 800. Pulse Radius: 600. Damage per Second: 18/32/46/60. Move Speed Slow: 20%/25%/30%/35%. Slow Duration: 0.5. Shield Duration: 4/5/6/7. Cooldown: 30/25/20/15. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Sinister Gaze
abilities.description: Hypnotizes an enemy unit, causing it to move towards a point between the Lich and the enemy unit while draining a percentage of its current mana. Cast Range: 600. Max Channel Time: 1.1/1.4/1.7/2 (1.4/1.7/2/2.3). Distance Moved: 32%/38%/44%/50%. Current Mana Loss per Second: 20%. Mana Restore Factor: 1. Radius: (400). Cooldown: 24/22/20/18. Mana Cost: 25.

abilities.name: Ice Spire
abilities.description: Applies all effects of Frost Shield around the Ice Spire and regenerating its health while the ice magic pulsates. Cast Range: 750. Effect Radius: 550. Move Speed Slow: 25%. Hit Count: 4. Duration: 15. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Mana Cost: 25.

abilities.name: Chain Frost
abilities.description: Releases an orb of frost that bounces between nearby enemy units, slowing and subsequently increasing its damage each time it bounces. Cast Range: 750. Bounce Radius: 550. Number of Bounces: 10. First Damage: 250/400/550. Damage Increment per Bounce: 15/20/25. Move Speed Slow: 65%. Cooldown: 100/80/60. Mana Cost: 180/300/420.
